economic_notes: First Nation holds 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building materials supply) and 16.66% equity interest in MMPLP (M'Nidoo M'Nising Power Limited Partnership). Located on Manitoulin Island, Ontario.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 but auditor's report is dated March 4, 2024 — significant delay in audit completion. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP (building materials) and MMPLP (power). Large deferred revenue balance of $4.48M mainly from ISC ($2.03M) and CMHC ($1.26M). Contingent liability of $426,000 related to Robinson Huron Treaty Trust loan guarantee. Net financial assets figure not directly stated on face of statements; net assets end of year = $593,000. ISC funding recognized was $932,449 vs confirmed $2,036,689 due to deferral. CMHC recognized was $222,524. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $932,449 + CMHC $222,524 + Provincial $13,528 + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body $514,291 = $1,682,792 (slight rounding; used $1,682,263 per line items). Segmented information pages were presented in reversed/mirrored text rendering; expense by segment extracted with best effort.
